calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: LaVon Granger
Appearances:
James Mark Millar, Esq. for Plaintiffs Miguel Angel Yedra and Hector Yedra were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendants Damian Tyrell Rainey and Stevi N. Barton.
Medical Reimbursement Lien CCSF for Miguel Yedra $ 11,742.06
Medical Reimbursement Lien CCSF for Hector Yedra $ 10,357.10
Costs of $388.00
Requested pain and suffering for Miguel Yedra $123,242.06
Requested pain and suffering for Hector Yedra $110,357.10
Matter taken under submission by the court.
October 9, 2003 P.M.
Judgment granted as follows:
Plaintiff Miguel Yedra is awarded $48,468.24 against defendants: Damian Tyrell Rainey and Stei N. Barton.
Plaintiff Hector Yedra is awarded $41,428.40 against defendants: Damian Tyrell Rainey and Stevi N. Barton.
Plaintiffs are to recover legal costs fo $388.00 for a
total judgment of $90,284.62.
Judgment filed.
